MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc is present. Represented by Jennifer Longley.
Attorney, Francisco Torres is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dejuan Sparks is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Jeffrey Jacobi.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 01, 2012 is vacated.
